item.name: Wind-up Kain
item.description:
A few moments may be needed to allow him to regain control of himself.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Kain minion.
item.tooltip:
It's all right. I...I'm back
in control of myself.
   - Kain
item.specialactiondescription:
Renders ally Gates, Shield, and Search Eye impervious to damage.
Duration: 20s
